common.networkError: Cannot connect to server. Is the backend running on port 8000?

home.guestSubtext: A modern workspace for candidates, recruiters, and admins with transparent AI-assisted matching.
home.valueFastDesc: Publish jobs, track applicants, and move through stages with fewer manual steps.
home.valueTransparentDesc: TF-IDF scoring and weighted breakdowns help teams understand why results rank the way they do.
home.valueCollaborativeDesc: Candidates discover roles, recruiters manage pipelines, and admins keep operations healthy.

signup.title: Sign up
signup.phoneHelp: E.164 or local; must be unique if provided

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your account email. If found, a reset token will be sent.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Paste the reset token from your email and set a new password.

changePasswordRequired.title: Choose a new password
changePasswordRequired.subtitle: An administrator reset your password. Sign in with the temporary password you were given, then set your own password here.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized
unauthorized.message: You do not have permission to access this page.

recruit.mockNotice: Sample data for layout preview. Wire up job and application APIs to replace this.

candidate.dashboardSubtitle: Track applications and discover roles that fit your profile.
candidate.profileHint: Profile scoring can be added when your CV is wired in.
candidate.noOpenJobs: No open roles to highlight. Browse the job board.
candidate.pipelineEmpty: No applications yet. Apply to a role to see it here.

jobs.browseSubtitle: Open roles published by recruiters. Sign in as a candidate to apply.
jobs.loadError: Could not load jobs. Is the API running?
jobs.empty: No open roles yet. Check back later.
jobs.optionalCvPlaceholder: Paste a CV or upload a file above — text is used for match scoring.
jobs.resumeUploadHint: PDF, DOCX, or TXT (max 5 MB). Text appears below; you can edit before applying.
jobs.resumeExtractSuccess: Resume text loaded. You can edit it before preview or apply.
jobs.resumeExtractError: Could not read this resume. Use PDF, DOCX, or TXT.
jobs.previewError: Could not preview fit score. Try again.
jobs.cvTooShort: Please enter at least 20 characters of CV text for fit preview.
jobs.browseNotice: Listings show open postings only. Optional CV text enables a TF-IDF similarity score with each role.
jobs.applyError: Could not submit application. Try again.
jobs.alreadyApplied: You have already applied to this role.

applications.title: My applications
applications.subtitle: Status updates across every role you have applied to.
applications.empty: You have not applied to any roles yet.
applications.liveNotice: Statuses are updated by recruiters as you move through the pipeline.

recruiter.dashboardSubtitle: Monitor open roles, new applicants, and next actions.
recruiter.jobsSubtitle: Publish roles, track applicants, and collaborate with your team.
recruiter.saveError: Could not save the job. Try again.
recruiter.emptyJobs: No postings yet. Create one to get started.
recruiter.jobsLiveNotice: Postings below are saved to your account.
recruiter.statsApplicantsHint: Sum of applicant counts on your postings.
recruiter.statsNewHint: Weekly trends can be added in a later iteration.
recruiter.pipelineEmpty: No applications yet. When candidates apply, they appear here.

pipeline.title: Candidate pipeline
pipeline.subtitle: Review candidates across stages.
pipeline.liveNotice: Drag-and-drop boards can be added later; stages update instantly.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Account information from your profile.
profile.candidateSubtitle: Complete and update your candidate background, location, and health details.
profile.bmiHelper: Calculated automatically from height and weight.

profileComplete.title: Complete your profile
profileComplete.subtitle: Add the key details recruiters need before you start applying.
profileComplete.requiredHint: Finish the required fields now, or skip and update them later from your profile page.
profileComplete.completeRequiredFields: Fill in the required fields to continue, or choose Skip for now.
profileComplete.updateError: Could not save your profile details.
profileComplete.skipError: Could not skip profile completion right now.

signin.title: Admin sign in
signin.subtitle: Staff access only. Use your administrator credentials.
signin.notAdmin: This account is not an administrator. Use the regular sign-in page.

users.editUserFull: Edit profile, status, security, and view account details
users.editSecurityHint: Reset password and revoke sessions apply immediately and do not require Save.
users.cannotDemoteOwnSuperHint: You cannot remove your own super admin flag here.
users.confirmDeactivateBody: User {{email}} will not be able to sign in until reactivated.
users.resetPasswordConfirmBody: A new random password will be set for {{email}}. All active sessions for this user will be signed out. This cannot be undone.
users.newPasswordWarning: Copy this password now. It will not be shown again.
users.cannotResetOwn: You cannot reset your own password here
users.cannotDeactivateSelf: You cannot deactivate your own account
users.cannotDeactivateSelfHint: You cannot deactivate your own account from here.
users.cannotChangeOwnRoleHint: You cannot change your own role from here.
users.confirmRevokeSessionsBody: This signs out {{email}} on all devices. Continue?

audit.resizeHint: Drag the right edge of a column header to resize. Scroll horizontally if the table is wider than the screen.
